title: Name one thing related to school that you would like to improve. How can you improve this area of your studies? Who can you ask for help, and what would you expect to learn from them?
extData:
{"answerTemplate":"点题:
"An area in school that I believe could use some improvement is [mention the area that needs improvement]."
原因:
"This area requires enhancement because [explain why you think this area needs improvement]."
计划: 
"To improve this, I plan to [describe your action plan]."
寻求帮助:
"I believe [mention who can help you] can provide valuable assistance because [explain why you chose them]."
期望:
"From their guidance, I expect to learn [mention what you hope to learn or achieve]."
结论:
"In conclusion, with the right guidance and dedicated effort, I am confident that I can improve in this area.""}
